title: Seal failure complaints - soup cans
ai_summary: Multiple complaints indicate weak seam integrity on lot SP-12-CHN with leaks reported after shipment.

title: Off-odor complaints - yogurt cups
ai_summary: Customer reports describe sour off-odor concentrated in vanilla yogurt cups from one production window.

title: Foreign material reports - granola bars
ai_summary: Three escalations cite hard plastic fragments in finished bars and require urgent containment.
